Video.summary: While Tony investigates the murder of a local drug and weapons dealer, Rachel is taken hostage.
Video.title: Romeo And Juliet

Video.summary: Rick Hunter's back. He's considering marrying his girlfriend. But before he could, she is murdered.
Video.title: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Image.alt: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Video.summary: Hunter becomes involved with a beautiful model he suspects of complicity in a jewelry robbery.
Video.title: Waiting For Mr. Wrong

Video.summary: Rachel's in labor and about to give birth at any minute with only Cyd to support her because Tony is literally out on a ledge trying to stop a troubled, older cop, who is a friend, from jumping.
Video.title: A Time To Be Born

Video.summary: As Halloween approaches, a heart is cut from the body of a corpse at a funeral home and concerned Eastbridge parents pressure Tony to protect their children from the suspect, an eccentric recluse.
Video.title: The Witches Of Eastbridge

Video.summary: Tony is asked to keep a young girl from being returned to her sexually abusive father.
Video.title: The Letter Of The Law

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall pursue a security guard turned thief as he searches for the money he stole and lost.
Video.title: Million Dollar Misunderstanding

Video.summary: Tony, distraught when it appears that Phil Reid, one of his best men, may be targeted for revenge by a dangerous escaped convict.
Video.title: Escape

Video.summary: Hunter helps a policeman who is framed for the murder of his wife.
Video.title: Think Blue

Video.summary: Tony is torn when a series of life-threatening incidents occur in Eastbridge and the only link appears to be Ed Mize, an old, mild-mannered friend currently experiencing marital difficulties.
Video.title: The Two Faces Of Ed

Video.summary: Tony runs up against an overzealous security guard; Rachel's father turns to Tony for help in a business deal.
Video.title: Security

Video.summary: While grocery shopping, Rachel runs head-on into a robbery-murder suspect -- and becomes the target of the killer's threats.
Video.title: Witness

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall realize they're attracted to each other as they protect an endangered witness.
Video.title: The Big Fall

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall witness a string of murders when they're assigned as technical advisers for a tv show.
Video.title: Killer In The Halloween Mask

Video.summary: Against departmental orders, Hunter goes to South America to stalk a diplomat who raped McCall.
Video.title: Rape And Revenge, Part 2

Video.summary: When McCall is raped by a South American diplomat immune from prosecution, Hunter follows him to his homeland.
Video.title: Rape And Revenge, Part 1

Video.summary: A prominent doctor kills an officer's wife while driving drunk.
Video.title: Dead Drunk

Video.summary: A commander kills his wife’s lover, then frames Chris and Rita by manipulating a D.A. and evidence.
Video.title: Witness

Video.summary: Chris is suspended for shooting an unarmed thief as the victim’s mother plots unexpected revenge.
Video.title: Domestic Agenda

Video.summary: Rita takes in a homeless young girl who has witnessed a brutal murder.
Video.title: Lady Luck

Video.summary: Rita and Chris defend Rita’s friend accused of killing her nanny amid her husband’s secret affair.
Video.title: The Sock Drawer

Video.summary: Rita and Chris go undercover to trap a killer who runs a string of illegal gambling casinos.
Video.title: Internal Affairs

Video.summary: Chris becomes involved with a college prostitute as he and Rita attempt to solve the death of another.
Video.title: Working Girl

Video.summary: Hutch goes undercover as a drug dealer to help Chris and Rita solve the murder of a young bystander.
Video.title: Powder Burn
